problemStatement: Add an unsupported-units banner to the report card: surface the count and language list, and exclude unsupported units from aggregate grade calculations.
userValue: The plan correctly addresses all product requirements: partitioning units into supported/unsupported, rendering a banner with count and language list in both text and markdown formats, excluding unsupported units from all aggregates (GPA, distribution, averages, badges), clarifying denominators, and covering edge cases with tests.
